subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath transformed wrath and fury into mercy and victory, and hath ordained for every drop of blood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی بدل الغضب و القهر بالرحمه و النصر و قدر لکل قطره من دماء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @courtesy; culture [adab]
